name: auspost-blade-mcp
title: Australia Post
description: Australia Post — postage calculator, shipping, tracking, and locations via official AusPost APIs
author: groupthink-dev
tagline: Postage rates, parcel tracking, and shipping labels

highlights.text: Postage calculator — domestic and international rate quotes
Tracking — real-time parcel status and delivery estimates
Locations — post offices, parcel lockers, and business hubs
Labels — create shipments and generate shipping labels
Write-gated — shipment creation behind explicit flag
Test mode — sandbox for label generation without real shipments

readme:
### What it does

Australia Post gives your AI agent access to the official AusPost APIs — postage calculation, parcel tracking, shipping label creation, and post office location lookup.

Your agent can quote postage for a parcel, track a delivery, find the nearest post office or parcel locker, or create a shipping label — all from conversation.

### Two-tier API access

AusPost exposes two API tiers with different credentials:

- **PAC + Locations** (free API key) — postage calculator, postcode search, post office locations. No contract required.
- **Shipping & Tracking** (eParcel contract) — shipment creation, label generation, tracking. Requires an eParcel or StarTrack account.

The plugin works with just the free API key for postage quotes and location lookups. Add shipping credentials when you need label generation and tracking.

### Safety model

- **Reads** work immediately — postage quotes, tracking lookups, location search
- **Writes** require `AUSPOST_WRITE_ENABLED=true` — create shipments, generate labels, place orders
- **Test mode** available — `AUSPOST_SHIPPING_TEST_MODE=true` uses the AusPost sandbox so you can test label generation without creating real shipments

scenarios.label: Quote and ship a parcel
scenarios.body: Calculate postage rates for a parcel by weight and dimensions, compare service options (Express vs Standard), then create the shipment and generate a shipping label.

scenarios.label: Track a delivery
scenarios.body: Look up a tracking number to check current parcel status, estimated delivery date, and scan history across the AusPost network.

scenarios.label: Find nearby drop-off points
scenarios.body: Search for post offices, parcel lockers, and business hubs near a suburb or postcode, with opening hours and available services.

env.name: AUSPOST_SHIPPING_TEST_MODE
env.description: Use AusPost test sandbox (no real shipments)

setup.blurb: Postage calculator, parcel tracking, shipping labels, and post office locations via official AusPost APIs
setup.help_text: Register for a free API key at developers.auspost.com.au for postage calculation and locations. Shipping & Tracking requires an eParcel or StarTrack contract with Australia Post.

fields.help: Shipping & Tracking API key — requires eParcel or StarTrack contract

fields.help: Set to 'true' to enable shipment creation, order placement, and label generation

fields.help: Set to 'true' to use AusPost test sandbox — no real shipments created
